## Summary
AI Backend Engineer specializing in backend systems, distributed architectures, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications. I am also exploring Forward Deployed Engineer roles that combine backend depth, customer context, and end-to-end ownership.

## Skills

Expert:
- Node.js
- TypeScript
- Backend System Design

Advanced:
- Express.js
- PostgreSQL
- MongoDB

- REST APIs
- System Design

- NestJS

- BullMQ
- Redis

- React
- Next.js

## AI / LLM Stack
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Google Gemini API
- Embeddings
- pgvector (vector similarity search)
- Vercel AI SDK
- Prompt Engineering
- Context grounding / hallucination control

## Backend Engineering
- Microservices architecture
- Event-driven systems
- Authentication (JWT, OAuth, RBAC)
- Rate limiting & security hardening
- Background job processing
- WebSockets / real-time systems
- API design (REST & GraphQL)

## Infrastructure & Observability
- Docker
- CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- OpenTelemetry
- Prometheus
- Grafana

## Databases
- PostgreSQL (including pgvector)
- MongoDB
- Redis

## Projects

AI Portfolio RAG Chatbot
- Production RAG system powering portfolio assistant
- Uses Gemini embeddings + pgvector semantic search
- Designed to reduce hallucinations via grounded retrieval

AI Ticket Triage System
- Microservices-based architecture
- Kafka + BullMQ event processing
- Observability with OpenTelemetry + Prometheus + Grafana

WhatsApp Campaign Platform
- Node.js + automation system for business messaging workflows
- Built for real-world SME use case

Eventifyy Platform
- Full-stack event management system
- GraphQL API with PostgreSQL + React frontend

## Career Goals
Seeking opportunities as:
- AI Backend Engineer
- Forward Deployed Engineer
- Backend Engineer
- Full-Stack Engineer

I am especially interested in roles that require customer-facing problem solving, comfort with ambiguity, and ownership from discovery to deployment.

Open to remote and India-based roles.
